subject: WM-0004 review: changes_requested
body: High: packaged Electron still trusts WM_DESKTOP_DEV_SERVER_URL for the main renderer URL, allowing packaged launches to load arbitrary remote/dev content with the preload bridge and leaving packaged smoke unable to prove file renderer loading. Medium: package-dir copies the whole dist/main directory without cleaning it, so stale compiled files such as desktop-shell.e2e.test.js leaked into win-unpacked during review build.
